positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cosmic-themed hot air balloon floating over a serene, fantastical landscape. The balloon is intricately designed with celestial motifs like constellations, crescent moons, and nebulae, rendered in vibrant, glowing blues, deep purples, and gold accents. Below, the landscape features stylized, geometrically shaped mountains and a winding river under a twilight sky. The style should be a blend of detailed vintage scientific illustration and modern kawaii whimsy, using bold outlines and flat areas of color for strong contrast. Central composition, clean silhouettes, suitable for screen printing on a t-shirt. Volumetric lighting, high contrast, clean vector art look.
